title: Privacy Policy
privacyStatementP1: This Privacy Policy describes how OmniKit ("we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, and shares information when you visit our website (the "Site"). We are committed to protecting your privacy and being transparent about our data practices.
privacyStatementP2: By using the Site, you consent to the data practices described in this policy.
infoCollectP1: We collect a limited amount of information to operate and improve our Site. The information we may collect includes:
infoCollectList1: Device Information: When you visit the Site, we may automatically collect your IP address, browser type, operating system, screen resolution, and timezone.
Usage Information: We may collect data about the pages you view, the tools you use, and general interaction patterns on the Site.
Cookie Data: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your experience and support our advertising partners.
infoCollectP2: Important: All developer tools on OmniKit run entirely in your browser. The text you encode, decode, hash, encrypt, or otherwise process using our tools is never transmitted to our servers or any third-party servers.
infoUseP1: We use the information we collect for the following purposes:
infoUseList1: Site Analytics: To understand how visitors use our Site, identify trends, and improve our tools and user experience.
Advertising: To support our free service by displaying relevant advertisements through third-party ad networks.
Security: To detect and prevent abuse, fraud, or security issues.
Compliance: To comply with applicable legal obligations.
infoUseP2: We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
cookiesP1: The Site uses cookies and similar technologies for the following purposes:
cookiesList1: Essential Cookies: Required for the Site to function properly (e.g., remembering your language preference).
Analytics Cookies: Used by services like Google Analytics to collect anonymous usage statistics.
Advertising Cookies: Used by our ad partners to deliver relevant advertisements and measure ad effectiveness.
cookiesP2: You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings. Please note that disabling certain cookies may affect your experience on the Site. For more information about cookies, visit www.allaboutcookies.org.
advertisingP1: OmniKit is a free service supported by advertising. We partner with third-party ad networks that may collect information about your browsing activity across multiple websites to display personalized advertisements.
advertisingP2: These partners may use technologies such as cookies, web beacons, and tracking pixels to collect browsing data for ad targeting and measurement purposes. The information collected is typically anonymous and does not personally identify you.
advertisingP3: You have the right to opt out of personalized advertising. You can exercise this right through:
advertisingOptList: Your browser's privacy and cookie settings
The Digital Advertising Alliance opt-out page: optout.aboutads.info
The Network Advertising Initiative opt-out page: networkadvertising.org/choices
The European Interactive Digital Advertising Alliance: youronlinechoices.com
advertisingNote: Note: Opting out of personalized advertising does not mean you will no longer see ads — it means the ads you see will be less relevant to your interests.
thirdPartyP1: We use Google Analytics to collect and analyze usage data for the Site. Google Analytics collects information such as how often users visit the Site, what pages they visit, and what other sites they used prior to coming to the Site. You can learn more about Google's privacy practices at google.com/intl/en/policies/privacy and opt out of Google Analytics at tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout.
thirdPartyP2: We may use additional third-party services for advertising, analytics, or site functionality. Each third-party service has its own privacy policy, and we encourage you to review them.
dataSecurityP1: All developer tools on OmniKit process data entirely within your web browser using client-side JavaScript. Your data — including text, files, and cryptographic operations — never leaves your device. We do not have access to, nor do we store, any data you process using our tools.
dataSecurityP2: We implement reasonable security measures to protect the Site and its infrastructure. However, no method of electronic transmission or storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
yourRightsP1: Depending on your location, you may have certain rights regarding your personal information:
yourRightsList1: Access: You have the right to request access to the personal information we hold about you.
Correction: You have the right to request correction of inaccurate or incomplete personal information.
Deletion: You have the right to request deletion of your personal information, subject to certain legal exceptions.
Opt-Out: You have the right to opt out of personalized advertising and certain data processing activities.
Data Portability: In some jurisdictions, you have the right to receive your personal information in a structured, machine-readable format.
yourRightsP2: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us. We will respond to your request in accordance with applicable laws.
dataRetentionP1: We retain analytics and advertising data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy, or as required by law. Data processed by our developer tools is never stored by us and exists only temporarily in your browser session.
childrenP1: The Site is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe we have inadvertently collected information from a child under 13, please contact us and we will take steps to delete such information promptly.
changesP1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices, technology, or legal requirements. We will post the updated policy on this page with a revised "Last updated" date. Your continued use of the Site after any changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
linksP1: The Site may contain links to third-party websites or services. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of these external sites. We encourage you to review the privacy policies of any third-party sites you visit.
contactP1: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us.
